DP.079.0000:
Gardenia: At my Gym, no one gets to
battle with the Gym Leader--me--until\r
they’ve beaten all the other Trainers.\f
I’ll be waiting for you in the back.
Good luck, challenger!\f
DP.079.0001:
Hey, there!
How’s it going, Champ-to-be?\f
Actually, that’s what I said to some
boy who zipped in here earlier, too!\f
The Gym Leader, Gardenia, is a user
of Grass-type Pokémon.\f
It should be obvious, but Grass-type
Pokémon really hate fire.\f
Oh, wait a second. I should tell you
about the Gym itself first.\f
You can’t challenge the Gym Leader
until you find and beat all the Gym’s\r
Trainers who’ve hidden themselves.\f
It’s a bit challenging, but just think
of it as good training and go for it!
DP.079.0002:
Oh! [0103,0000]!
You’ve beaten the Gym Leader!\f
Your Pokémon look much tougher than
when they went in, too!\f
At least that’s how I see it!

Leader: Gardenia\f
